user.title: Connect to PlayStation Family
user.description: Sign in at playstation.com as the Family Manager, then open https://ca.account.sony.com/api/v1/ssocookie and copy the 64-character `npsso` value below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PlayStation Family
reauth_confirm.description: Your PlayStation session has expired. Sign in again at playstation.com, open https://ca.account.sony.com/api/v1/ssocookie and paste the new `npsso` value.

error.scope_unavailable: Authenticated, but this account cannot access the Family API. Make sure you used the Family Manager account.

abort.wrong_account: The npsso belongs to a different PlayStation account than the one originally configured.

set_weekly_schedule.name: Set weekly schedule
set_weekly_schedule.description: Sets a child's recurring play-time limit for each weekday (Monday-Sunday). 0 minutes (or omitted) means no limit for that day.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The PlayStation Family child device to update. Use this or an entity ID.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: An entity belonging to the child to update. Use this or a device.

monday.name: Monday
monday.description: Play-time limit for Monday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

tuesday.name: Tuesday
tuesday.description: Play-time limit for Tuesday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

wednesday.name: Wednesday
wednesday.description: Play-time limit for Wednesday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

thursday.name: Thursday
thursday.description: Play-time limit for Thursday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

friday.name: Friday
friday.description: Play-time limit for Friday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

saturday.name: Saturday
saturday.description: Play-time limit for Saturday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

sunday.name: Sunday
sunday.description: Play-time limit for Sunday, in minutes (0 = no limit).

window_start.name: Playable window start
window_start.description: Start of the playable-hours window, in minutes from midnight (default 0).

window_end.name: Playable window end
window_end.description: End of the playable-hours window, in minutes from midnight (default 1440).
